# Instructions Template

## Overview

This document provides systematic instructions for [INSTRUCTION_PURPOSE] using the Gen-e2 methodology. [INSTRUCTION_DESCRIPTION] follows the [PREVIOUS_INSTRUCTION] process and [TRANSFORMATION_DESCRIPTION] into [OUTPUT_DESCRIPTION].

## Process Overview

**[INSTRUCTION_NAME]** transforms [INPUT_DESCRIPTION] into [COMPREHENSIVE_OUTPUT_DESCRIPTION] that [VALUE_PROPOSITION] and [STRATEGIC_BENEFIT].

- [ACTIVITY_DESCRIPTION]

**Quality Standards**:

- [QUALITY_STANDARD]
- [QUALITY_STANDARD]
- [QUALITY_STANDARD]

## Template Usage Instructions

### Purpose
This template provides a standardized structure for creating Gen-e2 assessment instruction documents that maintain consistency with repository conventions and style guide standards.

### When to Use
- Creating new instructions for Gen-e2 methodology extensions
- Developing specialized instruction sets for specific assessment contexts
- Ensuring consistent documentation structure across all instruction types

### Template Variables
Replace all `[VARIABLE]` placeholders with specific content:

**Core Variables:**
- `[INSTRUCTION_PURPOSE]`: Brief description of what the instructions cover
- `[INSTRUCTION_DESCRIPTION]`: Brief description of the instruction type
- `[PREVIOUS_INSTRUCTION]`: Reference to preceding instruction in methodology
- `[TRANSFORMATION_DESCRIPTION]`: What the stage transforms or processes
- `[OUTPUT_DESCRIPTION]`: What the stage produces
- `[INSTRUCTION_NAME]`: Formal name of the instruction
- `[INPUT_DESCRIPTION]`: What serves as input to this stage
- `[COMPREHENSIVE_OUTPUT_DESCRIPTION]`: Detailed description of outputs
- `[VALUE_PROPOSITION]`: Why this stage is valuable
- `[STRATEGIC_BENEFIT]`: Strategic benefit to the overall assessment

**Process Step Variables (Repeat for each step):**
- `[STEP_NUMBER]`: Sequential number (1, 2, 3, etc.)
- `[PROCESS_STEP_NAME]`: Descriptive name of the step
- `[STEP_OBJECTIVE]`: What this specific step aims to achieve
- `[ACTIVITY_DESCRIPTION]`: Specific activities within this step
- `[QUALITY_STANDARD]`: Quality criteria for this step
- `[OPTIONAL_SUBSECTION]`: Additional subsection if needed (e.g., "Requirements", "Checklist")
- `[OPTIONAL_NUMBER]`: Number of items in optional subsection
- `[OPTIONAL_ITEMS]`: Type of items (e.g., "Sections", "Items", "Requirements")
- `[OPTIONAL_CONTENT_STRUCTURE]`: Structure for optional content

**Other Variables:**
- `[OUTPUT_TYPE]`: Type of output being generated

**Related Resources Variables:**
- `[RELATED_RESOURCE_TITLE]`: Title of the related resource
- `[RELATED_RESOURCE_LINK]`: Link to the related resource

### How to Use for Multiple Steps

1. **Copy the Step Pattern**: Use the step template pattern shown in Implementation Process
2. **Increment Numbers**: Change `[STEP_NUMBER]` to 1, 2, 3, etc.
3. **Customize Each Step**: Replace all variables for each specific step
4. **Add/Remove as Needed**: Include only the steps relevant to your process
5. **Maintain Consistency**: Keep the same structure (Objective, Activities, Quality Standards) for all steps

### Quality Standards
- ✅ All variable placeholders replaced with specific content
- ✅ Section structure follows repository conventions
- ✅ Process steps numbered and detailed appropriately
- ✅ Each step includes Objective, Activities, and Quality Standards
- ✅ Command examples provide clear usage guidance
- ✅ Related resources include all relevant cross-references
- ✅ Document metadata completed with current information

### Integration Standards
- ✅ Links use relative paths following repository conventions
- ✅ File naming follows established patterns from repository conventions
- ✅ Style follows established Gen-e2 documentation standards
- ✅ Content structure aligns with other instruction documents
